channel.title: Brazil Elections 2026
channel.description: Real-time monitoring of the 2026 Brazilian presidential elections.

item.title: Guerra de Trump contra Irã abala indecisos às vésperas das eleições de meio de mandato nos EUA
item.description: President Donald Trump's war against Iran is influencing undecided voters in the United States, a key demographic that could determine whether Republicans retain control of Congress in the November midterm elections. The escalation of the conflict is creating uncertainty and dividing opinions among voters, particularly those still undecided. The outcome may directly affect the balance of power in the U.S. legislature.

item.title: Lula critica EUA por invasões: 'Agora querem ser donos das terras raras'
item.description: President Lula criticized the United States during a Celac forum in Colombia, accusing the country of conducting invasions in other nations and now seeking to control global rare earth resources. He also intensified his criticism of the UN Security Council, suggesting it lacks legitimacy and fairness in international decision-making.

item.title: Ex-jogador Luís Fabiano se filia ao MDB em São Paulo
item.description: Former footballer Luís Fabiano, São Paulo idol and the club's third-highest scorer, joined the MDB party in São Paulo on March 20, 2026. The ceremony was attended by São Paulo Mayor Ricardo Nunes (MDB) and national party president Baleia Rossi. The party highlighted his commitment to sports as a transformative force but did not confirm whether he will run for office in the 2026 elections.

item.title: Lula é aconselhado a enviar nome de Messias ao Congresso mesmo sem garantia de vitória
item.description: Lula was advised by PT allies to immediately submit Jorge Messias's name to the Senate for the STF, despite lacking sufficient votes for confirmation. The strategy aims to prevent the nomination from being abandoned if Lula loses the election, as the Senate may lack quorum in an election year or delay the vote if he is defeated. The recommendation is based on preserving the historical tradition of STF nominations and preventing a future administration from nullifying the process, even without guaranteed approval.

item.title: SP libera R$ 2,6 bi para túnel Santos-Guarujá depois de TCU suspender aporte federal
item.description: São Paulo's government authorized R$ 2.64 billion in supplementary credit for the Santos-Guarujá Tunnel, two days after the TCU suspended a R$ 2.6 million federal contribution from APS due to lack of legal instruments and weak agreement with the Union. The state aims to reaffirm its financial capacity to maintain the project's schedule, which will be the largest under the New PAC and Brazil's first such structure, amid an ongoing dispute with APS over its inclusion in the contract with Mota-Engil.

item.title: Nunes lamenta saída de Tebet do MDB e a chama de 'marionete' de Lula em SP
item.description: São Paulo Mayor Ricardo Nunes (MDB) lamented Simone Tebet's departure from the party and her Senate candidacy under the PSB, claiming she had become 'Lula's puppet' in the state. He expressed surprise that someone of Tebet's stature would accept such a role.

item.title: Com presença de caciques, PSB marca filiação de Tebet para sexta-feira na Alesp
item.description: Planning Minister Simone Tebet will join the PSB in a ceremony at Alesp next Friday, with expected attendance from Vice President Geraldo Alckmin and Minister Márcio França. Her move from the MDB after 26 years is seen as a strategic effort to strengthen the allied base in São Paulo, supporting Fernando Haddad’s gubernatorial bid and positioning herself for a Senate run in the state.

item.title: Novo prefeito do Rio garante terreno do Gasômetro ao Flamengo
item.description: Rio de Janeiro's new mayor, Eduardo Cavaliere (PSD), announced that he secured an agreement with the federal government to guarantee the Gasômetro land to Flamengo for a new stadium, following a meeting with President Lula, Minister Esther Dweck, and former mayor Eduardo Paes. Cavaliere also pledged equal effort to reform São Januário stadium, Vasco's home ground, emphasizing his commitment to both Rio clubs.

item.title: Simone Tebet se filia ao PSB para disputar Senado em São Paulo
item.description: Planning and Budget Minister Simone Tebet announced her move from the MDB to the PSB to run for the Senate from São Paulo in 2026, ending nearly three decades with her former party. She will resign from her ministerial post in March to comply with electoral ineligibility rules and will run on the Lula government's ticket alongside Fernando Haddad, the pre-candidate for governor. The PSB also includes Vice President Geraldo Alckmin and Minister Márcio França, both former São Paulo governors.

item.title: Kassab publica vídeo de João Santana sobre estratégia da 3ª via
item.description: Gilberto Kassab, national president of the PSD, shared a video by political strategist João Santana suggesting a center candidate could exploit weaknesses in the polarization between Lula and Flávio Bolsonaro in the 2026 election. Santana advocates a national conciliation strategy focused on democracy, social programs, development, and hope, avoiding attacks on extremes. The PSD is set to announce Paraná Governor Ratinho Jr. as its presidential pre-candidate on Wednesday (March 25), over Eduardo Leite and Ronaldo Caiado.

item.title: Simone Tebet anuncia filiação ao PSB e deixa MDB após 29 anos
item.description: Simone Tebet announced her affiliation with the PSB after 29 years in the MDB, resigning as Minister of Planning and Budget. She intends to run for the Senate from São Paulo on a ticket headed by Fernando Haddad (PT), the pre-candidate for governor, after confirming her departure from government by March 30.

item.title: Filme sobre Jair Bolsonaro ganha trailer e é divulgado por Carlos Bolsonaro
item.description: Carlos Bolsonaro shared the trailer for 'A Colisão dos Destinos', a film directed by Doriel Francisco that explores the personal and political journey of Jair Bolsonaro through testimonies from family and allies. Set for release on May 14, the movie features remarks from Flávio and Eduardo Bolsonaro, as well as Carlos himself, highlighting Jair’s difficult childhood, his political mobilization via the internet, and his strong personality.

item.title: PGR denuncia Silvio Almeida por importunação sexual a Anielle Franco
item.description: The Attorney General's Office denounced former minister Silvio Almeida to the Supreme Court for sexual harassment against Minister Anielle Franco, with the case under the rapporteurship of Minister André Mendonça. The complaint, filed on March 4 by PGR Paulo Gonet, follows a Federal Police indictment in November 2025 for alleged crimes against multiple women. Almeida denies the accusations, calling them lies and claiming he and Franco were 'ensnared' in a political gossip trap.

item.title: RJ: coronel Sylvio Ciuffo Guerra é novo secretário de Polícia Militar
item.description: Governor Cláudio Castro appointed Colonel Sylvio Ricardo Ciuffo Guerra as the new Secretary of Military Police in Rio de Janeiro, replacing Colonel Marcelo de Menezes, who stepped down to run in the 2026 elections. Ciuffo Guerra, with 34 years in the PM and training in military and public security, previously served as subsecretary of Command and Control. Menezes was one of the commanders of Operation Contenção, which resulted in 122 deaths in October 2023.

item.title: Simone Tebet anuncia filiação ao PSB para disputar eleição neste ano
item.description: Planning Minister Simone Tebet announced her affiliation with the PSB and confirmed her candidacy for the Senate from São Paulo in the 2026 elections. She leaves the MDB after nearly 30 years to support Fernando Haddad's (PT) gubernatorial ticket, as the São Paulo MDB is allied with Governor Tarcísio de Freitas. Tebet will also need to transfer her electoral domicile from Mato Grosso do Sul to São Paulo.

item.title: Ao vivo: Lula discursa na 10ª cúpula da Celac, em Bogotá
item.description: President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva attends the 10th CELAC summit in Bogotá, where he is expected to speak on combating organized crime, regional integration, criticism of the U.S., and defending Latin American sovereignty. The Itamaraty avoids labeling criminal factions as terrorists, deeming the discussion unproductive due to lack of regional consensus. Lula is also expected to emphasize regional unity in the face of external threats.

item.title: Rio de Janeiro tem novo prefeito
item.description: Vice Mayor Eduardo Cavaliere was sworn in as the new mayor of Rio de Janeiro on Friday (20), replacing Eduardo Paes, who is running for state governor in the October 3 elections. In his speech, Cavaliere emphasized overcoming obstacles, valuing public servants, and viewing Rio as a political cause, while Paes thanked his family and said he left the city better after four terms.

item.title: Flávio Bolsonaro quer se livrar de uma ‘herança maldita’ do pai
item.description: Flávio Bolsonaro is seeking to distance himself from his father Jair Bolsonaro's radical image by positioning himself as a center-right candidate, advocating for liberal economics, social programs, dialogue with opponents, and moderation in public security. His campaign argues that his reputation as a radical is an unfair 'cursed inheritance' from living in his father's shadow, and that speaking more will naturally reveal his moderate stance. He has already signaled this shift by stating he takes vaccines — unlike his father — and promises to replace the slogan 'a good criminal is a dead criminal' with a law-based approach that respects human rights in prisons.

item.title: Simone Tebet deixa MDB após quase 30 anos e se filia ao PSB para disputar o Senado em SP
item.description: Planning Minister Simone Tebet announced her affiliation with the PSB after nearly 30 years in the MDB, aiming to run for a Senate seat from São Paulo in the 2026 elections. She emphasized her political trajectory, including her senatorial term, 2022 presidential candidacy, and roles as mayor and vice-governor, noting support from President Lula and Vice President Alckmin. Tebet stated she plans to leave the ministry by the end of March and views her candidacy as a mission to represent the state that gave her the highest share of votes in the 2022 presidential election.

item.title: Lula propõe a Sheinbaum parceria no setor de petróleo
item.description: Brazilian President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva proposed to Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum a strategic partnership between Petrobras and Pemex to explore deep-water oil fields in the Gulf of Mexico, at a depth of 2,500 meters. The proposal was made during a phone call, at the request of Petrobras President Magda Chambriard, aiming to strengthen economic and energy ties between Brazil and Mexico ahead of their next bilateral summit, scheduled for June or July 2026.

item.title: Michelle e filhos postam homenagens nos 71 anos de Bolsonaro
item.description: The Bolsonaro family posted tributes on social media for Jair Bolsonaro's 71st birthday, as he remains hospitalized in the ICU with bilateral bacterial pneumonia. Michelle Bolsonaro called the date 'atypical', expressed gratitude and hope for justice, while sons Flávio, Eduardo and Carlos cited restricted contact, political persecution, and hopes for recovery. Eduardo stated he is barred from speaking with his father due to a decision by Minister Alexandre de Moraes, calling it 'torture'.

item.title: TRE-RJ: grupo vai impedir influência do crime organizado nas eleições
item.description: The Rio de Janeiro Regional Electoral Court has established a Unified Working Group for Electoral Integrity Defense to counter organized crime's influence in the 2026 elections. Led by TRE-RJ President Judge Claudio de Mello Tavares, the initiative coordinates intelligence and security forces to safeguard voting sites in high-risk areas and prevent illicit campaign financing or voter coercion by criminal organizations.

item.title: Simone Tebet acerta ida ao PSB e se prepara para disputar o Senado por São Paulo
item.description: Planning Minister Simone Tebet has agreed to join the PSB to run for a Senate seat in São Paulo in 2026, leaving the MDB due to the state party's alignment with opposition to Lula. She is expected to join Fernando Haddad's (PT) gubernatorial ticket, with Marina Silva anticipated to fill the other Senate slot. The PSB highlighted her affiliation as a strategic move to strengthen the party nationally.

item.title: Escândalo contamina as pesquisas, azeda o clima eleitoral e pressiona Lula a reagir
item.description: President Lula chose to confront Bolsonaro by linking the Banco Master scandal to the previous administration, aiming to distance the PT from blame and respond to mounting investigative pressure. Analysts say the scandal has become a central theme in the 2026 election, raising corruption to the same level as health and security in voter concerns. The government’s blame-shifting strategy is seen as fragile and insufficient, as incumbents typically bear the brunt of corruption scandals regardless of political affiliations.

item.title: Simone Tebet troca MDB por PSB para concorrer ao Senado em SP
item.description: Planning Minister Simone Tebet has left the MDB and joined the PSB, formalizing her potential candidacy for the Senate in São Paulo. The party highlighted her background as a former senator, former presidential candidate, and the first woman to preside over the Senate’s CCJ, underscoring her democratic commitment and institutional experience. Tebet is now seen as one of the leading contenders in the Senate race in Brazil’s most populous state.

item.title: Os aniversários de Bolsonaro em 10 anos: o que mudou nas comemorações
item.description: Over the past decade, Jair Bolsonaro’s birthdays have mirrored his political journey — ranging from private family gatherings to public events and livestreams with allies. In 2025, at age 70, he celebrated via livestream alongside his son Flávio and former first lady Michelle, offering the first slice of cake to lawyer Paulo Cunha Bueno and raising R$ 36,000 from an autographed helmet auction. Celebrations have varied from institutional settings (Palácio do Planalto, Alvorada) to international trips (U.S., Chile) and subdued observances, particularly during the pandemic and amid investigations into an attempted coup.

item.title: Ratinho será candidato do PSD (por André Gustavo Stumpf)
item.description: Paraná Governor Ratinho Junior (PSD) will be announced as the party's presidential candidate by the end of this month, following a meeting led by PSD president Gilberto Kassab to unify the party's potential candidates around a single nominee. The strategy drew inspiration from the unity of Ulysses Guimarães and Tancredo Neves, aiming to prevent internal dissent. Campaign expectations include strong performance in the South, competition in São Paulo against Flávio Bolsonaro, and support from Ronaldo Caiado in the Center-West.

item.title: Flávio faz homenagem a Bolsonaro em aniversário e fala em “tempo difícil”
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro paid tribute to his father, former President Jair Bolsonaro, on his 71st birthday, recalling shared moments and the absence in family routine. He referred to living in a 'difficult time,' reflecting on current challenges.

item.title: PF lidera confiança no Brasil; Congresso e STF vão mal, diz AtlasIntel
item.description: The Federal Police leads Brazilians' trust with 56% positive evaluations, according to an AtlasIntel/Estádio poll released on March 20, 2026. Congress, the STF, and the federal government show the worst results, with Congress at just 9% trust and STF and government exceeding 50% negative perception.

item.title: Flávio Bolsonaro homenageia o pai pelo aniversário de 71 anos
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro (PL-RJ) paid tribute to his father, former President Jair Bolsonaro (PL), who turns 71 on March 21, in an Instagram post made at the former president's residence. He recalled family moments, expressed missing their daily routine, and reaffirmed unconditional support, wishing health and wisdom to his father, who has been hospitalized since March 15 at DF Star Hospital due to bacterial bronchopneumonia and is serving a 27-year and 3-month sentence for leading the coup plot.

item.title: Haddad relembra a chamada "mancha" de Tarcísio como forasteiro na largada para 2026
item.description: Fernando Haddad officially launched his candidacy for governor of São Paulo in 2026, rejecting the notion that he is running merely to fill a slot or be sacrificed by his party. He pointed out that Tarcísio de Freitas, before being 'invented' by Bolsonaro as governor, had little familiarity with São Paulo and had even considered running for senator from Goiás, using this to challenge his opponent's political roots. Haddad stated his goal is to draw votes for Lula’s national ticket, repeating his strong performance in the capital in the last election.

item.title: MDB anuncia filiação de Luís Fabiano, ex-atacante do São Paulo
item.description: Former São Paulo striker Luís Fabiano joined the MDB in an event with Mayor Ricardo Nunes and national party president Baleia Rossi. The move comes as parties seek vote-getting figures for the Legislative, though his candidacy depends on a party convention. Fabiano is a São Paulo idol, the club’s third all-time leading scorer, and a 2010 World Cup participant with Brazil.

item.title: Luxemburgo apresenta melhora após internação, mas segue na UTI em Palmas
item.description: Coach and businessman Vanderlei Luxemburgo is hospitalized in the ICU of a private hospital in Palmas, showing clinical improvement after being admitted early Friday morning, the 20th. He remains under intensive care to complete antibiotic treatment and is expected to be discharged on Sunday, the 22nd, with a gradual return to activities starting next week. Luxemburgo is a pre-candidate for the Senate in Tocantins from the Podemos party and has been preparing to launch his political campaign.

item.title: Pacheco chama Lula de 'maior democrata' da história do Brasil em aceno à disputa por Minas
item.description: Senator Rodrigo Pacheco (PSD-MG) praised President Lula (PT) as an 'extraordinary human figure' and the 'greatest democrat' in Brazil's history during a speech in Sete Lagoas (MG), in a political gesture aimed at the 2026 electoral dispute in Minas Gerais.

item.title: Pacheco exalta Lula: “O maior democrata da nossa história”
item.description: Senator Rodrigo Pacheco (PSD-MG) praised President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva during an event in Sete Lagoas (MG), calling him an 'extraordinary human figure' and 'the greatest democrat in our history'. The remark was made at a ceremony for the delivery of school buses at an Iveco factory, amid pressure from the PT for Pacheco to run in the 2026 elections.

item.title: Borussia Dortmund x Hamburgo: onde assistir ao vivo, horário e escalações
item.description: Borussia Dortmund and Hamburg will face each other this Saturday, March 21, 2026, at 2:30 PM Brasília time, in the 27th round of the Bundesliga at Signal Iduna Park. Dortmund, sitting in second place, aims to close the gap on league leaders Bayern Munich, while Hamburg, 11th, fights to avoid relegation. The match will be broadcast live on CazéTV, Sportynet, and OneFootball, with Dortmund heavily favored according to betting odds (70% win probability).

item.title: Polêmica sobre classificar PCC e CV como terroristas vira novo capítulo da polarização
item.description: The proposal to classify PCC and CV as terrorist groups in the U.S. has sparked polarization in Brazil, with Bolsonaro allies using the issue to attack Lula’s government on public security, while Foreign Minister Mauro Vieira attempted to block the unilateral U.S. measure. Despite the serious criminal activity of these groups, the debate is seen as opportunistic and ineffective in addressing the real challenge of organized crime.

item.title: 8ª rodada do Brasileirão terá clássico paulista; saiba onde assistir aos jogos
item.description: The 8th round of the 2026 Brasileirão will be played this Saturday (21) and Sunday (22), featuring the Paulista derby between São Paulo and Palmeiras at 9 PM at Morumbi. Palmeiras took the lead after defeating Botafogo, while Bahia sits in 3rd with 14 points and Flamengo closes the G-4 with 13. After the round, the league will pause for 10 days due to the FIFA international break.

item.title: Cooperação ou soberania: o que Lula quer de Trump?
item.description: The article notes that the 1988 Federal Constitution, in Article 20, establishes that mineral resources, including oil and underground minerals, are the property of the Union, meaning the federal government has exclusive authority over their exploration. This reinforces national sovereignty over natural resources, regardless of external pressures or international agreements. The context suggests that, despite potential negotiations with other countries—such as the U.S. under Trump—the final decision on exploiting natural resources in Brazil remains under exclusive control of the Brazilian state.

item.title: Roberto Reis na Crusoé: A lógica da zebra
item.description: In an article for Crusoé, Roberto Reis analyzes the viability of a 'third way' in Brazil's 2026 elections, stating that while possible, it is not the baseline scenario. Winning in a polarized context would require not only an exceptional campaign but also a major misstep by the leading candidates. Voters choose not just who they prefer, but who seems capable of defeating their political 'villain'.

item.title: Lula envia PL que proíbe opinião política em estádios na Copa Feminina
item.description: The Lula government has sent a bill to Congress that would prohibit political expressions in stadiums during the 2027 FIFA Women's World Cup in Brazil, banning the display of political, racist, xenophobic or discriminatory signs, flags, or chants. The measure aims to ensure order and security, with violators facing denial of entry or immediate removal from the venue. The proposal references the 2014 incident where fans chanted against then-President Dilma Rousseff during the men's World Cup opening match.

item.title: Líder do PL procura STF para resolver imbróglio da sucessão de Castro
item.description: PL Chamber leader Sóstenes Cavalcante sought STF support to overturn the suspension of a law reducing the public office incompatibility period to 24 hours, a move blocked by Minister Luiz Fux, which maintains the six-month requirement and hinders Douglas Ruas’s bid as interim governor. With Cláudio Castro set to resign to run for Senate and no vice-governor in place, Rio will hold an indirect election for interim governor, a scenario Castro’s allies argue favors Eduardo Paes.

item.title: SP propõe 10% de aumento e plano de carreira para polícia
item.description: São Paulo Governor Tarcísio de Freitas has sent a proposal to the state legislature calling for a 10% salary increase for the Civil and Military Police, along with a revision of the Civil Police career plan. The package aims to improve working conditions and retain personnel in the state's security forces.

item.title: Tarcísio envia projeto que promete aumento de 10% em salários das polícias
item.description: Governor Tarcísio de Freitas sent a proposal to the São Paulo State Assembly (Alesp) that includes a 10% salary increase for the Civil and Military Police, along with career progression reforms. For the Military Police, it calls for the immediate promotion of 8,500 soldiers (80% of 10,600) from 2nd to 1st class, with the rest to be promoted by July and December 2025, at an estimated cost of R$15 million. For the Civil Police, it sets new advancement rules based on time, performance, discipline, and training, effective from 2027, with a monthly cost of R$3.6 million, though the Police Delegates’ Union argues the measures fall short of bringing São Paulo up to par with other states.

item.title: Colônia x Borussia Mönchengladbach: onde assistir ao vivo, horário e escalações
item.description: Colonia and Borussia Mönchengladbach face off this Saturday, March 21, 2026, at 11:30 AM Brasília time, at the RheinEnergieStadion, in the 27th round of the 2025/26 Bundesliga. Cologne, 14th with 25 points, aims to end a six-game winless run to avoid relegation, while Borussia MGladbach, 12th with 28 points, looks to build on a 2-0 win over St. Pauli. The match is a crucial relegation-six pointer, with only three points separating the sides, and will be streamed live on OneFootball.

item.title: PEC do fim da escala 6 X 1 deve ficar para depois das eleições
item.description: The PEC to end the 6X1 work schedule, promoted by President Lula to gain electoral support, will be postponed until after the October 2026 elections. Although rapporteur Paulo Azi aims to present the report in April, the bill is unlikely to reach the Chamber floor before July, with a possible vote in August due to the legislative recess. The proposal faces resistance and depends on building consensus over its legal structure (direct abolition of 6X1 vs. 40-hour week), sectoral impacts, and congressional willingness in an election year.

item.title: Série B do Brasileiro começa com campeões estaduais em campo e novo formato
item.description: The 2026 Brazilian Série B kicks off this Saturday with five matches, featuring state champions such as Ceará, CRB, Operário-PR, Fortaleza, and Sport. The new format awards direct promotion to the top two teams, while teams finishing 3rd to 6th will compete in playoffs for the remaining two Série A spots. Four teams relegated from Série A (Fortaleza, Ceará, Juventude, Sport) and four promoted from Série C (Ponte Preta, Londrina, Náutico, São Bernardo) are in the competition.

item.title: Comunicação melhorou, mas eleitor é resistente, diz secretário da Secom
item.description: João Brant, secretary of Digital Policies at Secom, says the stagnation in President Lula's approval is due to political polarization and voter 'calcification,' not communication failures. He notes the government has adopted a lighter, more relatable tone since 2025 but acknowledges structural limits, such as reduced fiscal space early in the term, which limited new policy achievements to communicate.

item.title: O que dizem diplomatas sobre Caiado, Trump e as terras raras
item.description: Diplomats consulted by the column state that the memorandum of understanding between the government of Goiás, led by Governor Ronaldo Caiado, and the Trump administration lacks legal validity. The agreement, concerning the transition to an open market for critical minerals and the definition of mineral policies in Brazil, is deemed invalid for three reasons: it is a memorandum of understanding (not a legally binding treaty), states lack the authority to enter such agreements, and mineral resource management is exclusively a federal responsibility. Goiás officials reject the criticism, deny illegality or unconstitutionality, and say they will seek federal cooperation when needed.

item.title: Palmeiras defende longa invencibilidade contra o São Paulo; veja odds
item.description: Palmeiras maintains an 11-game unbeaten streak against São Paulo, with seven wins and four draws in that span, entering the MorumBis clash as the favorite for the eighth round of the 2026 Brasileirão. Verdão assumed the league lead with the same 16 points as Tricolor, but ahead on tiebreakers. Betting odds slightly favor Palmeiras (2.80) over São Paulo (18.00) to win the match.
